title: Oh Baby, I’m on Craftsy!
excerpt: Excited to announce my first class on Craftsy – Baby Scrapbooking ! At the end of last year, after weeks of preparation, I went to Denver to shoot for Craftsy. It was such a wonderful experience overall and I feel…
body:
Excited to announce my first class on Craftsy – Baby Scrapbooking! At the end of last year, after weeks of preparation, I went to Denver to shoot for Craftsy. It was such a wonderful experience overall and I feel blessed to be able to work with such awesome professionals. I mean, look at that hair and make up!

We used a lot of my Stitched collection with American Crafts and even made some exclusives available only in this bundle.

Purchase this exclusive kit, filled with items that I hand-picked and designed just for Craftsy, and bring your special kit items to life with a complementary online mini-class. Although the focus is on adorable baby scrapbook pages, I think you’ll be able to use all kinds of photos from your everyday life. I will show you how to create three charming layouts to preserve your favorite memories with baby, from pregnancy to birth and beyond. May even be a great gift idea for a new mom or mom-to-be who doesn’t scrapbook yet.

Preserve your little one’s cutest moments with memorable scrapbook pages! This kit includes exclusively designed wood and acrylic embellishments and hand-stitched tags. Plus, enjoy American Crafts paper, die cuts and stickers from the Amy Tangerine Stitched collection. Your exclusive lessons are available online with unlimited anytime, anywhere access. Your kit will take some time to arrive (see shipping details), but you can dive into your HD video lessons immediately!

As I mentioned before, though the focus is on baby scrapbook pages, you’ll be able to use the concepts and kit items to create all kinds of pages from your everyday life! XO
